job_location: Berlin, Germany; Helsinki, Finland; Stockholm, Sweden

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Enhancing reporting and metrics quality as a whole
evidence.domain_risk: Understanding the needs of the business to providing easily understandable and actionable data
evidence.data_team_maturity: Managing data integrations, pipelines, models, and dashboards using modern tools (Snowflake, SQL, Looker, Airflow, Dagster, GitHub)
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and implement complex data pipelines with dependency control and orchestration
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Develop a self-service data modelling strategy
evidence.autonomy_level: Lead, mentor, and guide more junior team members
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Enhancing reporting and metrics quality as a whole, from understanding the needs of the business to providing easily understandable and actionable data
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The focus on 'enhancing' existing reporting and metrics quality signals improvement of established infrastructure rather than building new systems from scratch.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid, at the office, or remote within the location (Berlin, Helsinki, or Stockholm)
evidence.ai_role: Managing data integrations, pipelines, models, and dashboards using modern tools (Snowflake, SQL, Looker, Airflow, Dagster, GitHub)
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Tech stack consists entirely of traditional data tools with no AI-specific capabilities or tools mentioned.
evidence.testing_framing: Enhancing reporting and metrics quality as a whole
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Direct ownership framing with 'enhancing' action verb paired with explicit quality accountability.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Understanding the needs of the business to providing easily understandable and actionable data
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Positive value-delivery framing with no compliance, regulatory, or incident-prevention language.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple quality and structured approach signals (data quality, advanced SQL, optimized queries, dependency control, orchestration) with no velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Marketplace/e-commerce domain (food delivery) where data errors affect business decisions without regulatory or financial reporting consequences.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named tools in responsibilities, established infrastructure with central maintenance, and mentorship of junior team members indicate functioning team at scale but not mature/established at highest levels.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The specific technical language around 'dependency control and orchestration' suggests hiring manager input, but generic responsibility framing indicates recruiter involvement.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role's core mission—building self-serve infrastructure, increasing data literacy, and managing the analytics stack—serves data consumers and the data function itself.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic direction-setting (develop strategy, mentor, increase literacy) with execution responsibilities (design, implement, manage pipelines).
